headline: The Bull Case For CME Group (CME) Could Change Following Rising Fed Hike Odds And New Futures Launch
summary: CME Group Inc. previously filed a US$466.785 million shelf registration for 1,500,000 Class A common shares tied to its ESOP, while Tickblaze announced a new integration of CME futures market data and CME launched four South Asia edible oil futures contracts that began trading in early March 2026. At the same time, CME’s own data now shows traders assigning a much higher probability to a Federal Reserve rate hike later this year, highlighting how shifts in interest rate expectations can...
